hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *FigmaDemoKit/Sources/*|*FigmaDemoKit/Tests/*|*FigmaDemoKit/Package.swift|*FigmaDemoKit/Package.resolved) jq -nc --arg f "$f" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: ("FigmaDemoKit module changed (" + $f + "). Review CLAUDE.md and README.md and update if the module list, architecture, build/test commands, or anything user-facing in those docs has drifted from the change.")}}' ;; esac; }
